Receita de pre-processamento

Source: R/machine-learning.R
rnp_ml_receita.Rd

Constroi uma recipe com passos comuns, indicados por nomes em portugues.

Usage

rnp_ml_receita(formula, data, passos = NULL)

Arguments

formula

Formula y ~ ..

data

data.frame.

passos

Vetor de passos: "normalizar", "dummy", "imputar_media", "imputar_moda", "zero_var", "correlacao", "boxcox".

Value

Objeto recipe.

See also

Other ml: rnp_ml_ajustar(), rnp_ml_arvore(), rnp_ml_boosting(), rnp_ml_comparar(), rnp_ml_cv(), rnp_ml_floresta(), rnp_ml_importancia(), rnp_ml_knn(), rnp_ml_particao(), rnp_ml_prever(), rnp_ml_regularizada(), rnp_ml_svm(), rnp_ml_tunagem()

Examples

# \donttest{
rnp_ml_receita(Species ~ ., iris, passos = c("normalizar"))
#> 
#> ── Recipe ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> 
#> ── Inputs 
#> Number of variables by role
#> outcome:   1
#> predictor: 4
#> 
#> ── Operations 
#> • Centering and scaling for: recipes::all_numeric_predictors()
# }
